root.docs_md:
The desktop application: the top-level binary and [`VmuxPlugin`] that wire every crate
together, plus macOS-native integrations (glass/blur, event tap, native focus, tray,
menu, recording, persistence).

items.name: VmuxPlugin
items.docs_md:
The top-level aggregator: adds `DefaultPlugins`, every feature plugin, and the
macOS-native integrations that make up the desktop app.

items.name: VmuxUpdater
items.docs_md:
Auto-updater for Vmux. Checks a remote endpoint for new versions,
downloads the signed `.app` bundle, and replaces the current one in-place.
The update takes effect on the next launch.

```rust,ignore
let updater = VmuxUpdater::builder()
    .endpoint("https://example.com/updates.json")
    .pubkey("<minisign-public-key>")
    .initial_delay(Duration::from_secs(5))
    .poll_interval(Duration::from_secs(3600))
    .build();
```
